title: Container wont use static ip if start with docker-compose up without detached
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. 
```docker-compose
version: "3.9"

networks:
  default:
    external: 
      name: podman
services:
  bitwarden:
    container_name: bitwarden
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    pull_policy: always
    cap_add:
      - NET_BIND_SERVICE
    sysctls:
      - net.ipv4.ip_unprivileged_port_start=0
    networks:
      default:
        ipv4_address: 10.88.0.89
```
2. docker-compose up

**Describe the results you received:**
Container doesn't utilize the static ip. In this case it got the next one 10.88.0.90

**Describe the results you expected:**
The same behaviour that when you do: `docker-compose up -d`
In this case the ip gets set to 10.88.0.89

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["storage.options.override_kernel_check" "storage.options.thinpool.ostree_repo" "storage.options.thinpool.skip_mount_home"] from "/etc/containers/storage.conf". 
Version:      3.3.1
API Version:  3.3.1
Go Version:   go1.15.14
Built:        Mon Aug 30 16:46:46 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
